## UpdatePublicProfileInput variable

Input schema for updating an existing PublicProfile. All fields are optional except id.

**Signature:**

```typescript
UpdatePublicProfileInput: z.ZodObject<
	{
		id: z.ZodString
		createdAt: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>>
		updatedAt: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>>
		agentId: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodString>
	},
	'strip',

		id: string

		updatedAt?: (Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>) | undefined
		agentId?: string | undefined
```
